hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start by drawing the grid - a rectangle and four lines

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Create helper functions for drawing crosses and circles

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a 2D list (list of lists) to track which squares are occupied

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Remember the first move is always 'o', alternating after that

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Check for wins after each move by examining all 8 possible winning lines (3 rows, 3 columns, 2 diagonals)

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: For AI moves, first check if you can win, then check if you need to block, then pick any open square
